title: Signoff dry-run automation
goal: Turn the external signoff pack into executable local dry-run checks without connecting to real cloud or executing production actions.
scope: Add a dry-run script that validates local evidence artifacts.
Mark real provider/resource, production backup/rollback, and live restore checks as external-only.
Run the dry-run and store the full JSON output under /tmp/codex-tool-runs/svton/.
next_decision: Continue automatically to S027 production MVP final gate.
